column2: <div cla","The Good Cera Super Cream provides the skin with precious vitamins and minerals which in turn shield it against moisture loss. The hypoallergenic formula penetrates the skin to restore its natural balance. Oat extracts support the skin's defences and aloe vera regenerates it.
